creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the detailed background, Yasuhiro-san.  This is good to
understand, it's a glimpse into the situation and needs of our users,
which is unvaluable.

I will shortly apply patches for the other lang/gcc4* ports per your
recommendation.  (One change I'll make is to do so for lang/gcc49
unconditionally, also on sparc64, given that we're omitting the
expiration date now.)
